---
name: web-scraping
description: Extract structured information from web pages.
user-invocable: false
---

# Web Scraping Skill

Use scraping techniques when information must be gathered from many pages.

Use English field labels in extracted datasets, but prioritize Indonesian websites and Indonesia-specific pages whenever available.

Extract structured data such as:

- price by variant
- release date
- specifications
- dimensions
- engine and transmission
- ground clearance
- tank capacity
- fuel consumption
- suspension
- tires and wheels
- luggage capacity
- features by variant
- ADAS features by variant
- annual tax if available
- after-sales and warranty details

Normalize the extracted data into a variant-by-variant matrix when possible.

If another related detail is important for the car review, extract it too.
